name: opentry_7_unified_csp_evaluator
dataset_protocol: CrystaLLM Table 3 official MP-20 and MPTS-52 splits
failure_policy: retain failed and missing generations as failures; never drop official test samples
rmse_definition: pymatgen StructureMatcher.get_rms_dist(pred, gt)[0], averaged over matched samples
match_policy: CSP match/RMSE is independent of sensibility and SMACT validity, matching CrystaLLM bin/benchmark_metrics.py
